name: LUMI
framing: A lamp that pushes back on our relationship with our screens.

blocks.body: My first fully 3D-modelled project, built entirely from 3D-printed parts and electronics. The brief — to design a product that encourages responsible social-media use and questions our addiction to it — became a lamp for people living with ADHD, anxiety, social-media addiction, or all three.
I 3D-printed threaded components that screwed together, and modelled the internal housing for LED lighting strips — designed to be controlled by an app or custom software.

The artefact: a working lamp object, designed for the screen-time-responsive behaviour but not yet implementing it. The software side remains open — the next stage of the project rather than this one.
